allow:
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import re, base64

header = '=?utf-8?B?5b2T5YmN5L2c5Lia5a2U5pWw?='
pattern = r'=\\?\([^?]+\)\\?B\\?\([^?]+\)\\?='
match = re.match\(pattern, header, re.IGNORECASE\)
if match:
    encoded_text = match.group\(2\)
    decoded_bytes = base64.b64decode\(encoded_text\)
    print\(f'UTF-8: {decoded_bytes.decode\(\\"utf-8\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'GBK: {decoded_bytes.decode\(\\"gbk\\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import re, base64

test_cases = [
    \('=?utf-8?B?5b2T5YmN5L2c5Lia5a2U5pWw?=', '当前作业孔数'\),
    \('=?utf-8?B?5pyA5bCR5qOA6aqM5pe26Ze0?=', '最少检验时间'\),
    \('=?utf-8?B?5b2T5YmN5qOA6aqM5pe26Ze0?=', '当前检验时间'\),
    \('=?utf-8?B?5qCh6aqM57uT5p6c?=', '校验结果'\),
]

pattern = r'=\\?\([^?]+\)\\?B\\?\([^?]+\)\\?='

for header, expected in test_cases:
    match = re.match\(pattern, header, re.IGNORECASE\)
    if match:
        encoded_text = match.group\(2\)
        decoded_bytes = base64.b64decode\(encoded_text\)
        result = decoded_bytes.decode\('utf-8'\)
        print\(f'{result} == {expected}: {result == expected}'\)
")
